detail_reasoning.summary: The model gives the Philadelphia Phillies a 62% win probability. This forecast is 100% machine-learned (trained on 1377 graded games this season) and 0% matchup heuristics — the ML share grows automatically as daily results are added.

factors.text: Christian Scott holds a clear FIP edge (4.68 vs 4.15), with WHIPs of 1.48 / 1.30 and K rates of 23.1% / 27.9%.
Over their last five starts the blended ERA/FIP marks are 5.04 (home) vs 4.42 (away) — a clear edge in current form for the New York Mets.
Bullpen Availability Scores: 96 vs 78 (quality FIP 3.16/3.98, relief IP last 3 days 0.0/0.0, closer available True/True).
Against a righty starter, the Philadelphia Phillies OPS split vs the New York Mets split shows a clear edge for the Philadelphia Phillies; 14-game OPS runs 0.628 vs 0.775.
Philadelphia Phillies get home field at Citizens Bank Park (park factor 102, roughly neutral). Home teams win about 53.5% of MLB games.
